text:
Evidence that AI models can, indeed, learn "taste" in this paper where a small model, trained on citations, is able to predict which papers will be hits

Citations, upvotes & shares are signals that can teach AI judgment about quality, not just execution. https://t.co/2KWBQIMqt0 https://t.co/nI26UhdI9c

搞了个开源项目把MacBook 刘海 改造了下

能显示 Claude Code 每个终端的对话状态

工具调用和上下文状态，感觉很不错

而且还增加了宠物模式，可以根据你使用Claude Code的情况宠物会进行升级...

当然还有语音提醒什么的，就是晚上花了2个小时搞的，还有其他问题明天再调整下，开源给大家 https://t.co/5DwYX1bazF

还有个临时的文件停放区

这个是开源软件自带的，我准备改造成可以拖放喂给Claude 的 嘿嘿 https://t.co/14JKlZ30Ql

RT @Jiaxi_Cui: 一个融资复盘

24 年 7 月到 25 年 7 月，我几乎都在做合成数据
当时我就已经很确定：在 LLM 训练里，高质量合成数据会替代人工标注，因为它更便宜、更快，效果更好，而且不像人一样会出错
但那一波我最大的问题是不够坚定

当时我只和两家机…

I don’t think AIs should be auto-adding themselves as credited on projects on Github or elsewhere.

It primarily serves as a marketing tool to promote the product, but undermines the much more critical aspect that humans should be able to choose their relationship with AI work.

Fruit Love Island is the world's hottest new TV show.

The first episode dropped a week ago, and it's gone vertical.

Hundreds of millions of people are tuning in, thousands are voting, and celebrities are posting about it.

It's entirely AI-generated and airs on TikTok 🤯 https://t.co/RAbBVlIJvT
